articles.author: Kyle Orland
articles.title: Meet the players who lost big money on Peter Molyneux’s failed Legacy - Ars Technica
articles.description: After millions in NFT sales, the hyped “play to earn” game was effectively dead in weeks.

articles.author: Omar Sohail
articles.title: iPhone 18 Pro Max Is Proof That Apple No Longer Believes Thicker Devices Are Aesthetically Unattractive, As Long As There Are Benefits - Wccftech
articles.description: A thicker iPhone 18 Pro Max will bring various advantages to the table, as new details reveal the flagship’s dimensions and compared them to the iPhone 17 Pro Max
articles.content: The era of thinner iPhones was finally put to rest when Apple introduced the iPhone 17 Pro Max, its thickest flagship to date. While some might conclude that the Cupertino firm has lost its design mo… [+2683 chars]
